settings.question: What is the Metamorphosis Affiliate Program?
settings.answer: The Metamorphosis Affiliate Program is an opportunity for beauty influencers, skincare experts, and content creators to earn commissions by promoting FDA-cleared LED Light Therapy devices. Affiliates receive a custom tracking link to share with their audience and earn a percentage on every sale made through their link​.

settings.question: Why should I join the program?
settings.answer:
By joining, you’ll get access to:
✔ Competitive commissions (up to 15%) on every sale.
✔ Exclusive promotions & early product launches.
✔ Free marketing materials & support to help maximize your earnings.
✔ A growing community of skincare & wellness enthusiasts dedicated to non-invasive beauty solutions​.

settings.question: Does it cost me anything to join?
settings.answer: No! The Metamorphosis Affiliate Program is completely free to join. There are no hidden fees or upfront costs—you simply earn as you promote​.

settings.question: Can I promote on multiple platforms?
settings.answer: Absolutely! You can promote Metamorphosis across multiple websites and social platforms as long as they align with our brand and follow ethical marketing practices​.

settings.question: What is considered a qualified sale?
settings.answer: A qualified sale occurs when a customer makes a purchase through your unique affiliate link and the order is successfully processed. Refunds, canceled orders, or fraudulent transactions do not count​.

settings.question: How much will I earn?
settings.answer: Affiliates start with a 10% base commission on all referred sales. High-performing affiliates generating $5,000+ in monthly sales qualify for 15% commission and additional performance bonuses​.

settings.question: What is cookie duration?
settings.answer: Our program includes a 90-day cookie tracking window. This means that if a user clicks your affiliate link but doesn’t purchase immediately, you’ll still earn a commission if they return and complete the purchase within 90 days​.

settings.question: How will you know the orders came from me?
settings.answer: Each affiliate gets a unique tracking link. When someone clicks on your link and makes a purchase, our real-time analytics dashboard ensures that the sale is accurately credited to your account​.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.bottom-content: If we still haven't answered your question, you can contact us via info@metamorphosislighttherapy.com
